steps.name: Implement query_context total-response size cap
steps.description: Add TOTAL_RESPONSE_MAX_CHARS = 24000 constant and capResultsToTotalBudget(results) pure function to src/core/format-response.ts per architecture-design.md contract: sums snippet.length across results from the END of the array backward (most recent first, since results is built oldest-to-newest), keeps the maximal suffix whose cumulative length is <= 24000, drops whole oldest results (never re-truncates mid-result). Extend buildQueryContextResults/formatQueryContextResponse to call this after assembling results; add a truncation warning to the warnings array when results were dropped. Does NOT reuse or modify capSnippetAtHeadingBoundary in concern-matcher.ts (per ADR-007). Covers scenarios 1-2 in tool-output-quality.feature.
criteria: A feature whose combined wave-decisions content exceeds 24000 chars returns a truncated response with a warning
A feature under the cap returns an unchanged, untruncated response (zero regression)
When truncated, the most recent phase's content is preserved and the oldest phase's content is dropped
steps.scenario_name: query_context caps an oversized aggregated response with a warning

steps.name: Implement list_concerns heading-text stoplist
steps.description: Add GENERIC_HEADING_STOPLIST constant (case-insensitive exact-match list: Decisions, Summary, Key Decisions, Mode, Constraints Established, Upstream Changes, Requirements Summary, Domain Examples, Acceptance Criteria, plus other convention-driven boilerplate headers found in this repo's own wave-decisions.md files) and isGenericHeading(headingText) private function to src/core/concern-matcher.ts, following the existing REJECTION_KEYWORDS/containsRejectionKeyword pattern as structural precedent (not literal reuse -- exact match, not substring). Extend collectFeatureFileHeadingCandidates to filter out headings where isGenericHeading is true, BEFORE returning. Do NOT touch collectAdrCandidates or featureDirectoryNames passthrough -- stoplist applies ONLY to heading-text candidates. Covers scenarios 3-4 in tool-output-quality.feature.
criteria: A heading-text candidate matching the stoplist is excluded from the list_concerns response
A genuine decision-topic heading is not excluded
A feature directory or ADR title literally matching a stoplist term is not excluded
steps.scenario_name: list_concerns filters generic heading text but keeps genuine topics

steps.name: Implement list_features deliver-phase detection
steps.description: Extend discoverFeatures in src/shell/server.ts: for each phase directory named exactly 'deliver', check for execution-log.json at featureDirAbsolute/deliver/execution-log.json via reader.readFile; if it exists and is parseable JSON with an events array, include 'deliver' in that feature's phases array ONLY if at least one element has p === 'COMMIT'. Malformed/unparseable execution-log.json or missing file is treated as 'deliver phase not detected' (fail-closed, no new error/warning surfaced). All OTHER phase directories keep the existing wave-decisions.md-presence check, completely unchanged. classify-structure.ts requires NO change (it only consumes the resulting phases array, unaware of detection mechanism). Covers scenarios 5-7 in tool-output-quality.feature.
criteria: A feature with execution-log.json containing >=1 COMMIT entry includes 'deliver' in its phases array
A feature with execution-log.json containing zero COMMIT entries does not include 'deliver'
A feature with no deliver/ directory at all behaves identically to today (zero regression)
steps.scenario_name: list_features reports the deliver phase when execution-log.json has a COMMIT entry

steps.name: Add list_concerns nudge to resolve_concern's CONCERN_NOT_FOUND message
steps.description: Edit formatConcernNotFound in src/core/format-response.ts: change the message string from 'No nWave artifacts mentioning "${concern}" were found across the searched repos.' to additionally mention list_concerns() as the next step, e.g. append ' Try list_concerns() to browse available topics.' No change to function signature, parameters, or the ConcernNotFoundError type shape -- unconditional text, no check for whether list_concerns would itself return empty. Covers scenario 8 in tool-output-quality.feature.
steps.scenario_name: resolve_concern's not-found message nudges the agent toward list_concerns
